name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Participants, Coordinator
VARIABLES state, votes, decisions

Init == /\ state \in [Participants -> {"Init"}]
       /\ votes \in [Participants -> {"None"}]
       /\ decisions \in [Coordinator -> {"None"}]

Prepare == /\ \E p \in Participants:
              /\ state[p] = "Init"
              /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "Prepared"]
              /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "None"]
              /\ decisions' = decisions

VoteYes == /\ \E p \in Participants:
              /\ state[p] = "Prepared"
              /\ state' = state
              /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "Yes"]
              /\ decisions' = decisions

VoteNo == /\ \E p \in Participants:
              /\ state[p] = "Prepared"
              /\ state' = state
              /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "No"]
              /\ decisions' = decisions

Commit == /\ decisions[Coordinator] = "Commit"
        /\ \A p \in Participants:
              /\ state[p] = "Prepared"
              /\ votes[p] = "Yes"
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "Committed"]
        /\ votes' = votes
        /\ decisions' = decisions

Abort == /\ decisions[Coordinator] = "Abort"
        /\ \A p \in Participants:
              /\ state[p] = "Prepared"
              /\ votes[p] = "No"
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "Aborted"]
        /\ votes' = votes
        /\ decisions' = decisions

Next == Prepare \/ VoteYes \/ VoteNo \/ Commit \/ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, votes, decisions>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Fork ownership: forks[i] = j means fork i is held by philosopher j; forks[i] = -1 means fork i is free *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -> -1]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> -> "thinking"]

Next == \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks if both are free *)
          /\ states[i] = "hungry"
          /\ forks[i] = -1
          /\ forks[%(i, N) + 1] = -1
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![%(i, N) + 1] = i]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks after eating *)
          /\ states[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = -1, ![%(i, N) + 1] = -1]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N \cup {-1}]
          /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : forks[i] = -1 \/ forks[i] \in 1..N
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : forks[i] = -1 \/ forks[i] = i
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : forks[%(i, N) + 1] = -1 \/ forks[%(i, N) + 1] = i
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : states[i] \in {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N

Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y

VARIABLES num, flag

vars == <<num, flag>>

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ num[i] = 0
          /\ flag' = [j \in 1..N |-> IF j = i THEN TRUE ELSE flag[j]]
          /\ num' = [j \in 1..N |-> IF j = i THEN 1 + Max({num[k] : k \in 1..N}) ELSE num[j]]
          /\ flag' = [j \in 1..N |-> IF j = i THEN FALSE ELSE flag[j]]
          /\ \A j \in 1..N \ {i} :
                \E k \in 1..N \ {i, j} :
                  (num[j] < num[k]) \/ (num[j] = num[k] /\ j < k)
          /\ \A j \in 1..N \ {i} :
                (num[j] > num[i]) \/ (num[j] = num[i] /\ j > i)
          /\ num' = [j \in 1..N |-> IF j = i THEN 0 ELSE num[j]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

(* The queue is represented as a sequence of length K. *)
(* head and tail are indices into the sequence. *)
(* count is the number of elements in the queue. *)

(* The queue is empty when count = 0. *)
(* The queue is full when count = K. *)

(* The queue is a sequence of length K. *)
(* The elements are stored in q[head], q[head+1], ..., q[tail-1] modulo K. *)

(* The initial state: the queue is empty. *)
Init == /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0

(* The producer action: it blocks when the queue is full. *)
Producer == /\ count < K
          /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = 1]
          /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
          /\ count' = count + 1
          /\ head' = head

(* The consumer action: it blocks when the queue is empty. *)
Consumer == /\ count > 0
          /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 0]
          /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
          /\ count' = count - 1
          /\ tail' = tail

(* The next-state relation: either the producer or the consumer acts. *)
Next == Producer \/ Consumer

(* The specification: the system starts in Init and evolves according to Next. *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

(* Type correctness: q is a sequence of length K, head and tail are integers in 1..K, count is an integer in 0..K. *)
TypeOK == /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
          /\ head \in 1..K
          /\ tail \in 1..K
          /\ count \in 0..K

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Server

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state



(* --specification
  Init == /\ state == Follower
          /\ currentTerm = 0
          /\ votedFor = None
  Next == \/ /\ state' == Follower
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
          /\ votedFor' = votedFor
          \/ /\ state' == Candidate
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
          /\ votedFor' = Self
          \/ /\ state' == Leader
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
          /\ votedFor' = votedFor
  Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, currentTerm, votedFor>> *)

(* --invariant
  TypeOK == /\ state \in {Follower, Candidate, Leader}
           /\ currentTerm \in Nat
           /\ votedFor \in {None} \cup Server
  Invariant == TypeOK *)

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active, r

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
       /\ writer_active = 0

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = 0
          /\ \A r \in readers: r = 0
          /\ \E r \in readers: r' = 1
          /\ writer_active' = 0
        \/ /\ writer_active = 1
          /\ \A r \in readers: r' = 0
          /\ writer_active' = 1
        \/ /\ writer_active = 0
          /\ \A r \in readers: r' = 0
          /\ writer_active' = 0

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values
VARIABLE store

Init == 
  /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
  /\ \A k \in Keys: store[k] = 0

Next == 
  /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : 
       /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
       /\ UNCHANGED <<>>  (* no other variables *)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

TypeOK == 
  /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
  /\ \A k \in Keys: store[k] \in Values

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, promises, accepts, chosen, ballots
HighestPromised(acceptor) == promises[acceptor][1]
HighestAccepted(acceptor) == accepts[acceptor][1]
HighestAcceptedValue(acceptor) == accepts[acceptor][2]

(* Type invariants *)
TypeOK ==
  /\ acceptors \subseteq Nat
  /\ proposers \subseteq Nat
  /\ promises \in acceptors -> [ballot: Nat, value: Nat]
  /\ accepts \in acceptors -> [ballot: Nat, value: Nat]
  /\ chosen \subseteq Nat
  /\ ballots \in proposers -> Nat

(* Initial state *)
Init ==
  /\ acceptors \subseteq Nat
  /\ proposers \subseteq Nat
  /\ promises = [a \in acceptors |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> 0]]
  /\ accepts = [a \in acceptors |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> 0]]
  /\ chosen = {}
  /\ ballots = [p \in proposers |-> 0]

(* Proposer actions *)
Prepare(p) ==
  /\ p \in proposers
  /\ ballots' = [ballots EXCEPT ![p] = ballots[p] + 1]
  /\ promises' = promises
  /\ accepts' = accepts
  /\ chosen' = chosen

Promise(a, p) ==
  /\ a \in acceptors
  /\ p \in proposers
  /\ promises' = [promises EXCEPT ![a] = [ballot |-> ballots[p], value |-> accepts[a][2]]]
  /\ accepts' = accepts
  /\ chosen' = chosen
  /\ ballots' = ballots

Accept(a, p, v) ==
  /\ a \in acceptors
  /\ p \in proposers
  /\ v \in Nat
  /\ accepts' = [accepts EXCEPT ![a] = [ballot |-> ballots[p], value |-> v]]
  /\ promises' = promises
  /\ chosen' = chosen
  /\ ballots' = ballots

Chosen(v) ==
  /\ v \in Nat
  /\ chosen' = chosen \cup {v}
  /\ promises' = promises
  /\ accepts' = accepts
  /\ ballots' = ballots

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
  \/ \E p \in proposers: Prepare(p)
  \/ \E a \in acceptors : \E p \in proposers : Promise(a, p)
  \/ \E a \in acceptors : \E p \in proposers : \E v \in Nat : Accept(a, p, v)
  \/ \E v \in Nat: Chosen(v)

(* Temporal specification *)
Spec ==
  Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposers, promises, accepts, chosen, ballots>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_CAPACITY
VARIABLES channel, retransmit_count, sent_chunks

    /\ file \in Seq(1..FILE_SIZE)
    /\ chunks = [i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) |-> 

            SubSeq(file, (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE + 1, i*CHUNK_SIZE)

            SubSeq(file, (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE + 1, FILE_SIZE)]
    /\ sent_chunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmit_count = <<>>
    /\ channel = <<>>

Next ==
    /\ channel \in Seq(1..CHANNEL_CAPACITY)
    /\ sent_chunks \in Seq(1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE))
    /\ retransmit_count \in Seq(1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE))
    /\ sent_chunks' = Append(sent_chunks, last(chunks))
       /\ retransmit_count' = Append(retransmit_count, 0)
       /\ channel' = Append(channel, last(chunks))
    \/ /\ sent_chunks' == sent_chunks
       /\ retransmit_count' = retransmit_count
       /\ channel' = Append(channel, last(chunks))
          /\ retransmit_count' = Append(retransmit_count, 0)
       \/ /\ channel' == SubSeq(channel, 1, Len(channel)-1)
          /\ retransmit_count' = Append(retransmit_count, 
              IF Len(retransmit_count) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 

                  retransmit_count[Len(retransmit_count)] + 1 

                  0)
    \/ /\ sent_chunks' == sent_chunks
       /\ retransmit_count' = retransmit_count
       /\ channel' = SubSeq(channel, 1, Len(channel)-1)

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sent_chunks, retransmit_count, channel>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Clients

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Next == \/ /\ free # {}
          /\ free' = free \ {p}
          /\ allocated' = [c \in Clients |-> IF c = client THEN allocated[c] \cup {p} ELSE allocated[c]]
          /\ client \in Clients
          /\ p \in free
        \/ /\ free' = free \cup {p}
          /\ allocated' = [c \in Clients |-> IF c = client THEN allocated[c] \ {p} ELSE allocated[c]]
          /\ client \in Clients
          /\ p \in allocated[client]
          /\ allocated[client] # {}

TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Clients: allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Clients: \A p \in allocated[c]: p \in Pages
          /\ \A c1, c2 \in Clients: c1 # c2 => allocated[c1] \cap allocated[c2] = {}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Node

VARIABLES counts

(* --state Init
counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]
*)

(* --state Increment
counts' = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> IF n = me THEN counts[n][m] + 1 ELSE counts[n][m]]]
*)

(* --state Merge
counts' = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> IF n = me THEN counts[n][m] ELSE MAX(counts[n][m], counts'[n][m])]]
*)

(* --state Next
\/ Increment
\/ Merge
*)

(* --state Spec
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars
*)

(* --state TypeOK
TypeOK == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
*)
